team.title: Voetbal.nl – Select Team
team.description: Enter the name of the futsal team you want to track. Optionally paste the direct team URL from voetbal.nl to skip the search.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Voetbal.nl
reauth_confirm.description: Your voetbal.nl session has expired. Please enter your credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to voetbal.nl. Please check your internet connection.
error.team_not_found: Team not found. Try providing the direct team URL.
